trigger_condition.note: Required contract size must be accommodatable within max risk limit

sizing_rule.note: Risk fixed 3% per trade; skip trade if position size required to respect stop loss cannot fit within this risk allocation. Implements Van Tharp's 3% risk rule with account accommodation filter.

source_rule_text: A trader should only enter a trade when the position size required to respect their maximum risk limit can be accommodated within their account; otherwise, the trade should be skipped.
